channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Several large pot holes at junction, 29th April
item.description:
The road surface at the traffic light junction is badly potholed and there are loose road stones, which also are dangerous. The whole road at this point is very uneven

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaville Way, Church End, East Finchley, London Borough of Barnet
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on Albatross Way, 29th April
item.description:
Flytipping on Albatross Way causing an obstruction. Please remove asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albatross Way, Rotherhithe, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches fallen onto roof into garden, 29th April
item.description:
We have reported this type of issue previously and it has been suggested the tree is too close to our home and would like to enquire if this tree can be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Paulinus Close, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned lime bikes on St Giles high street junction, 29th April
item.description:
North’s 20+ lime bikes and 6 forest bikes abandoned Shaftesbury avenue junction near Shaftesbury theatre

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, St Giles High Street, Bloomsbury, Camden Town, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstacles on the pavement, 29th April
item.description:
Various obstacles have been erected on the pavement next to a memorial wall.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Limes Avenue, Temple Fortune, East Finchley, London Borough of Barnet
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Goswell Road, 29th April
item.description:
The worst section has been resurfaced but the rest of the road is still deteriorating. More needs to be done to make this safe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Goswell Road, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lorrimore sqaure underpass, 29th April
item.description:
Electrical box door is open and crashing against the wall causing noise inside our flat

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van CA08NWO outside 53 STANMORE ROAD, 29th April
item.description:
White van CA08NWO has been abandoned outside 53 STANMORE ROAD for the past 6 months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanmore Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various items fly tipped in front of community gardens, 29th April
item.description:
I reported this earlier in the week and received an email yesterday saying the problem has been resolved. Imagine my surprise when I walked past today, to find nothing has been removed! Can you please clear the fly tipping Investigate and explain how this situation has arisen ie saying the fly tipping was cleared when it patently hasn’t been. I will complain to the Council if no explanation is forthcoming. Thanks Patrick Harborow

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Terrace, Camberwell, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large branch from tree fallen r/o 199 Ramillies Rd, Sidcup, 29th April
item.description:
Large branch from tree fallen r/o 199 Ramillies Rd, Sidcup - the branch is now leaning on callers fence...Tree itself is in Penhill Park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 203, Ramillies Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street tree, 29th April
item.description:
Young street street is leaning and swaying in the wind. Support posts are broken and no longer hold it vertical.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheringham Road, Anerley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping trolley dumped by Downs Park Road 64., 29th April
item.description:
Fly Tipping trolley dumped by Downs Park Road 64.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard fallen over, 29th April
item.description:
Can you please fix? On Chislehurst High st near Sainsburys

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, High Street, Chislehurst, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded sofa on the public footpath at the junction of St Andrews Grove and Fairholt Road on Monday., 29th April
item.description:
Discarded sofa on the public footpath at the junction of St Andrews Grove and Fairholt Road on Monday.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fairholt Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole at end of Park Road nr junction with Chislehurst High St, 29th April
item.description:
Please add to list to repair. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Chislehurst, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light head rotated, 29th April
item.description:
Traffic light for traffic turning from Evelyn Road into Oxestalls Road (protecting pedestrian and cycle crossing) is turned away from the traffic it applies to

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxestalls Road, New Cross, Lewisham, London Borough of Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Council owned Car park to block of flats, 29th April
item.description:
Domestic furniture and other waste dumped. Been there fir many weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Litter on Kent Road, 29th April
item.description:
Litter on Kent Road, bag torn open by foxes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Kent Road, Poverest, Orpington, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole o/s 22-23 Viewfield Rd, Bexley in road, 29th April
item.description:
Pothole o/s 22-23 Viewfield Rd, Bexley in road, caller says that workmen have been today to fill this hole, but there was another hole right next to it which has not been filled. Lady feels this can be dangerous for cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Viewfield Road, Blendon, Sidcup, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th April
item.description:
There some household items thrown at this location

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ramsgate Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
